acceptance_criteria: Integration tests passing and covering new code paths
Architecture reads as if the codebase was designed for this from the beginning
implementation_instructions: Use a team where it makes sense
Append worklog to the plan file documenting: blockers, tradeoffs, verification status, test results
review_instructions: Maximally principled architecture; no expedient shortcuts
All acceptance criteria in the plan must be met with evidence in the worklog
Integration tests must exist, pass, and cover new code paths
No TODOs, deferred work, or follow-up-needed items
If the worklog shows unresolved blockers, REJECT
Be demanding; do not approve mediocre work
When rejecting, write concrete revision instructions, not vague complaints
